package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_model_outside_models_package: GORM-backed structs with `gorm` tags declared outside `model` or `models` packages unless an explicit `entity` or `schema` package already exists.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule065NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule065NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule065NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario065Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule065NegativeService, input Rule065NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
